code.FUTURE_YEAR_MONTH: Month cannot be in the future.
code.SNAPSHOT_FUTURE_DATE: Snapshot date cannot be in the future.
code.SNAPSHOT_DATE_OUTSIDE_MONTH: Statement date must fall within the snapshot's month.
code.TRANSACTION_FUTURE_DATE: Transaction date cannot be in the future.
code.INVALID_SNAPSHOT_SHAPE: Snapshot values don't match this investment type.
code.INVALID_TRANSACTION_TYPE: Transaction type isn't supported for this investment.
code.INVALID_TRANSACTION_SHAPE: Transaction values don't match the chosen type.
code.FX_RATE_EXISTS: An FX rate already exists for that month and currency.
code.FOREIGN_POSITIONS_EXIST: Foreign-currency positions exist; remove them before turning off multi-currency.
code.POSITION_NOT_ACTIVE: This position is no longer active.
code.TAG_NAME_EXISTS: A tag with that name already exists.
code.INVALID_ROLLOVER_LINK: That deposit can't be linked as the rollover — it's the same deposit, already linked, or would form a loop.
code.INVALID_RATE: Rate must be greater than zero.
code.INVALID_IMPORT_MODE: Import mode must be preview or commit.

VALIDATION_RULE.email: must be a valid email address
VALIDATION_RULE.iso4217: must be a valid currency code
VALIDATION_RULE.oneof: is not one of the allowed values
